recommendations.title: 4:44 Last Day on Earth
recommendations.overview: A look at how a painter and a successful actor spend their last day together before the world comes to an end.

recommendations.title: Good Boy
recommendations.overview: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off quickly, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

recommendations.title: New Rose Hotel
recommendations.overview: A corporate raider and his henchman use a chanteuse to lure a scientific genius away from his employer and family.

recommendations.title: Succubus
recommendations.overview: A new father going through a marital separation joins a dating app and matches with a beautiful but mysterious young woman... whose powers of seduction and manipulation entangle him in a mystery more horrifying than he could have ever imagined.

recommendations.title: The Funeral
recommendations.overview: After the funeral of one of their own, a criminal family decides to embark on an emotionally unnerving journey in an attempt to exact bloody revenge.

recommendations.title: Love Hard
recommendations.overview: An LA girl, unlucky in love, falls for an East Coast guy on a dating app and decides to surprise him for Christmas, only to discover that she's been catfished. But the object of her affection actually lives in the same town, and the guy who duped her

recommendations.title: Bad Lieutenant
recommendations.overview: While investigating a young nun's rape, a corrupt New York City police detective, with a serious drug and gambling addiction, tries to change his ways and find forgiveness.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Date
recommendations.overview: No beau? No problem! To earn money for college, a high schooler creates a dating app that lets him act as a stand-in boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Addiction
recommendations.overview: A vampiric doctoral student tries to follow the philosophy of a nocturnal comrade and control her thirst for blood.

recommendations.title: The Scent of the Night
recommendations.overview: A former policeman turns full-time robber and goes on a downward spiral of crime in 1970s Rome.
